candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Change in other current assets and liabilities
candidates.why: Cash flow working-capital change line, not a stock measure of current assets.
Balancing line, not current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line rather than the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Share based payment - non cash to equity
candidates.why: Non-cash adjustment, unrelated to cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciling item, not ending cash balance on balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at start of period
candidates.why: Cash flow roll-forward opening balance, not the balance-sheet target when balance sheet is available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Semantically close, but balance-sheet cash line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Balancing line and non-current, not current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line rather than the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Current portion of long-term debt; valid component of short-term debt.
Direct current interest-bearing debt line and excludes lease wording; best standalone short-term debt row.

variables.notes: Chose the clean total current interest-bearing debt line. Did not also include 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid potential double counting if current maturities are already included in the short-term financial liabilities total. Excluded lease-related rows per rule.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is an explicit current taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet proxy for total/net property, plant and equipment under IFRS; a reported total tangible assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net gain from sale of PPE and project inventory
candidates.why: Cash flow/income adjustment line, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Investments in property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capex flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Net proceeds from sale of PPE and project inventory
candidates.why: Cash flow disposal proceeds, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease ROU asset component, not total PPE; gross line also not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset line, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line and only lease-related component, not total PPE.
Intangibles, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Gross - Total
candidates.why: Intangibles, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment - Total
candidates.why: Contra-intangible line, not PPE.
Balancing line for intangibles, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Investments in PPE and intangible assets
candidates.why: Investment flow, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Preferred the reported balance-sheet total tangible assets line as the closest total/net PPE measure available.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact match for net cash flow from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Exact operating cash flow line from cash flow statement.
